subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto him who loved Me and believed when most men denied Me, that the fragrance of remembrance might draw him and bring him unto a station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن احبنی و آمن اذ کفر اکثر الناس لیجذبه عرف الذکر و یبلغه الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @nearness and remoteness
